response.justification: Candidate has well over a decade of full-stack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js work at multiple Berlin startups, including direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at current role — directly matching the JD. Demonstrated breadth across frontend (React, Ember), backend (Node, GraphQL, microservices), databases (MongoDB, MySQL), cloud (AWS CDK), and containerization. Strong engineering culture signals (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based) and a track record of teaching/workshops indicate seniority and communication skills. Some gaps around Nest.js, Vitest specifically, and Kotlin are not explicitly addressed.
strengths: 10+ years full-stack with recent TypeScript/Node.js + React + AWS + MongoDB experience matching the primary stack
Current role explicitly covers AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly aligned with required AI agent development skill
Strong software craftsmanship background — TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus founder of an open-source platform deployed on Kubernetes
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Playwright in the listed experience
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience is older (robotic arms at Altom, 2016-2018)
Heavy use of DLang across several roles may indicate niche-language preference that doesn't transfer directly to the JD's primary stack
